criticalBugs.title: Leaderboard crashes: Select.Item empty value prop
criticalBugs.description: Navigating to /leaderboard shows 'Something went wrong' error boundary. Root cause: A <Select.Item /> component receives an empty string as its value prop. This crashes the Radix Select component.

criticalBugs.title: Story Point Viewer renders without h1 or content items
criticalBugs.description: Navigating to a story point (/spaces/:id/story-points/:id) results in a page where h1 is not visible and no content items (.rounded-lg.border) are found. This blocks all question type testing.

criticalBugs.title: Store Browse page is blank/non-functional
criticalBugs.description: The /store page for consumer users does not render h1, search input, or space cards. The content area appears empty.

criticalBugs.title: Login error messages not displayed
criticalBugs.description: When entering wrong password or invalid school code, no error message is shown to the user. The [class*='destructive'] or [role='alert'] elements are not rendering.

criticalBugs.title: Sidebar navigation to Leaderboard crashes app
criticalBugs.description: Clicking Leaderboard in sidebar navigation triggers the Select.Item crash (BUG-001), which can leave the user stuck on an error page.
